title: Ohara’s Will Survives
description: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Nico Robin, Spandam, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul. The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Please let me be with you, Mom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: We'll start the buster call now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: All ships, begin fire at once!!

summary: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
